name: career-command-center
description: A macOS application and Codex workflow for evidence-led career research, personalized intake, application tracking, and tailored CV generation.

interface.shortDescription: Find, tailor, and track career applications.
interface.longDescription: Audits career documents, returns cited project-specific questions in a native macOS workspace, organizes job and PhD opportunities, builds role-family master CVs, creates tailored application packages, and keeps configurable Codex searches synchronized. Career documents and application state remain in a workspace chosen by the user.
defaultPrompt: Run my targeted career search now.
